title: PackManifest
description: Input manifest for the delivery package generator (tools/New-DeliveryPackage.ps1). Declares which rules to include and any per-package overrides.

description.description: Package description surfaced in NuGet metadata.

rules.description: Rules to include in this delivery package.

id.description: Rule ID to include, e.g. CPMF-WFL-001. Must exist in the source rule library.

severity.description: Override DefaultErrorLevel for this package. Omit to keep the rule's default.

parameters.description: Parameter key/value overrides. Keys must match declared parameter keys in the rule.
